headline: IPCMC Revival Bill Tabled With Stronger Enforcement Powers
context: Government tabled revised Independent Police Conduct Commission bill in March 2026 with stronger enforcement powers than 2020 version.

cards.big: IPCMC revival bill tabled with enforcement powers absent in IPCC
cards.sub: New bill allows commission to compel testimony and initiate prosecutions

cards.big: Previous IPCC established 2022 could only recommend not compel action
cards.sub: IPCC received 3,200 complaints in 2025 with only 180 resolved

cards.big: New bill gives commissioners power to access police records and premises
cards.sub: Disciplinary recommendations would be binding rather than advisory

cards.big: Police unions opposed the bill with 45,000 officers signing petition
cards.sub: PDRM leadership expressed concern about operational interference

cards.big: IPCMC bill tests whether police accountability can be strengthened against institutional resistance
IPCMC revival with stronger powers. Independent police oversight only works with investigative independence.
